reviews.comment:
Hice 3 días antes una reserva  para dormir una noche y al llegar no tenían mi reserva anotada porque parece que se olvidaron de registrarla....una vergüenza,  tuvimos que seguir viaje hasta Pringles buscando alojamiento. Parece que en ese motel del ACA solo atienden a " empresas"....

(Translated by Google)
I made a reservation three days in advance for one night, and when I arrived, they didn't have my reservation recorded because they apparently forgot to register it... a disgrace. We had to continue our trip to Pringles looking for accommodation. It seems that this ACA motel only caters to "companies"...

reviews.comment:
Nos alojamos en el hotel, muy viejo, descuidado y muy caro. La atención es buena pero el lugar es carísimo en relación precio y confort.

(Translated by Google)
We stayed at the hotel, which was very old, run-down, and very expensive. The service was good, but the location was very expensive compared to the price and comfort.

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para pernoctar, si uno está en camino. Las habitaciones son cómodas, limpias con servicio de toallas y buen baño. Incluye desayuno, que es muy completo. Relación precio-calidad adecuado.

(Translated by Google)
A good place to stay overnight if you're traveling. The rooms are comfortable and clean, with towel service and a good bathroom. Breakfast is included and very comprehensive. Good value for money.
